name: clamped-values
description: Verify property values clamped to [0,1] after postcondition application
preconditions: Postcondition +0.2 on NPC with wealth=0.9 (would overflow), -0.3 on hunger=0.2 (would underflow)
expectedOutcome: Wealth clamped to 1.0, hunger clamped to 0.0

steps.comment: NPC created with extreme property values
